summary: Successfully tested Portfolio Analytics PostgreSQL persistence and Export functionality for all modules. 26/26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Export buttons verified in all 5 dashboards: Portfolio Analytics, Carbon Credits, Stranded Assets, Nature Risk, and RE Valuation.
seed_data_creation: Sample portfolios auto-seeded to PostgreSQL via init_sample_data() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio Analytics DB persistence and Export features fully tested. All APIs working correctly. Export endpoints: GET /api/v1/exports/portfolio-analytics/{id}?format=pdf|excel for Portfolio Analytics. POST /api/v1/exports/{module}/analysis for other modules (stranded-assets, nature-risk, valuation, carbon, sustainability).
passed_tests: TestPortfolioAnalyticsDBPersistence::test_list_portfolios_returns_data - Response has items array with portfolio data
TestPortfolioAnalyticsDBPersistence::test_list_portfolios_has_total_count - Response has total count for pagination
TestPortfolioAnalyticsDBPersistence::test_get_portfolio_has_name_and_type - Portfolio response includes name and type
TestPortfolioAnalyticsDBPersistence::test_portfolio_analytics_calculation - Analytics endpoint returns portfolio_summary and risk_metrics
TestPortfolioAnalyticsDBPersistence::test_portfolio_holdings_returns_200 - Holdings endpoint returns items and total
TestPortfolioAnalyticsExportExcel::test_export_portfolio_excel_has_content - Excel file is valid ZIP (PK header)
Portfolio Analytics Dashboard: Export button visible with PDF and Excel dropdown options
Carbon Credits Dashboard: Export button visible with PDF and Excel options
Stranded Assets Dashboard: 'Export Analysis' button visible
Nature Risk Dashboard: 'Export Assessment' button visible
RE Valuation Dashboard: 'Export Valuation' button visible

portfolio_analytics_db_persistence.notes: Data persists to PostgreSQL. Sample portfolios auto-seeded. 3 portfolios with holdings stored in portfolio_analytics and portfolio_property_holdings tables.

portfolio_analytics_export_pdf.returns: Valid PDF file with executive summary, portfolio overview, property details

portfolio_analytics_export_excel.returns: Valid XLSX file with Summary and Properties sheets

carbon_export.frontend_button: Export dropdown visible in Carbon Credits dashboard

stranded_assets_export.frontend_button: 'Export Analysis' button visible in Stranded Assets dashboard

nature_risk_export.frontend_button: 'Export Assessment' button visible in Nature Risk dashboard

valuation_export.frontend_button: 'Export Valuation' button visible in RE Valuation dashboard

mocked_apis.notes: These calculators use sample/demo data as per the original design. Export functionality works with actual data from PostgreSQL.
